title: I Blew 3 Funded Accounts Before Learning This One Thing (2026)
description: Stop repeating the same mistake that kills most funded traders. The R2F Trading system reveals the one ICT concept that changed everything — fair value gaps used the wrong way will drain your account every time. Watch to the end. r2ftrading.com
script: I blew 3 funded accounts in 6 months. Same mistake every single time. And I didn't even know I was making it. I was trading every fair value gap I saw. Didn't matter where. Didn't matter when. Just — gap fills, right? Wrong. That's exactly what kills most traders. The R2F Trading system taught us this — a fair value gap only matters when it sits inside a confirmed order block, WITH liquidity swept above or below. That's the filter. That's the difference between funded and blown. Start using that filter this weekend. Back-test it. Thank us later. Follow R2F Trading — new setups every single day at r2ftrading.com.
